<style id='global-styles-inline-css'>
:root{--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--square: 1;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--4-3: 4/3;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--3-4: 3/4;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--3-2: 3/2;--wp--preset--aspect-ratio--2-3: 	<div class="av-adv-header-slot-container" style="margin-top:0px;margin-bottom:20px;"><av-adv-slot data-avadv-config="{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;googleConsentCheck&quot;,&quot;canServe&quot;:{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;altervista&quot;,&quot;lazy&quot;:true,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;728X90&quot;},&quot;cannotServe&quot;:{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;altervista&quot;,&quot;lazy&quot;:false,&quot;unit&quot;:&quot;728X901&quot;,&quot;subUnit&quot;:&quot;leaderboard&quot;}}" class="av-adv-stack-isolated" data-av-adv-slot-height-mode="fixed" style="--av-adv-slot-height: 90px"><av-adv-placeholder inert><span>Pubblicità</span></av-adv-placeholder></av-adv-slot></div>

<article class="av-elem featured-elem post-5144810 post type-post status-publish format-standard has-post-thumbnail hentry category-libri-per-bambini">
	<figure class="img-cont">
		<a href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/unicorni-da-colorare-per-bambini-5-8-anni-disegni-semplici-e-adorabili-ideale-per-piccoli-artisti-e-amanti-della-magia/" rel="bookmark" title="Unicorni da Colorare per Bambini 5-8 Anni: Disegni semplici e adorabili – Ideale per piccoli artisti e amanti della magia! ">
			<img width="1376" height="1000" src="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11.png" class="attachment-full size-full wp-post-image" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" srcset="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11.png 1376w, https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11-320x233.png 320w, https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11-960x698.png 960w, https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11-768x558.png 768w, https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11-150x109.png 150w, https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11-600x436.png 600w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 1376px) 100vw, 1376px" data-attachment-id="5144812" data-permalink="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/unicorni-da-colorare-per-bambini-5-8-anni-disegni-semplici-e-adorabili-ideale-per-piccoli-artisti-e-amanti-della-magia/image-12/" data-orig-file="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11.png" data-orig-size="1376,1000" data-comments-opened="1" data-image-meta="{&quot;aperture&quot;:&quot;0&quot;,&quot;credit&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;camera&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;caption&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;created_timestamp&quot;:&quot;0&quot;,&quot;copyright&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;focal_length&quot;:&quot;0&quot;,&quot;iso&quot;:&quot;0&quot;,&quot;shutter_speed&quot;:&quot;0&quot;,&quot;title&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;orientation&quot;:&quot;0&quot;}" data-image-title="image" data-image-description="" data-image-caption="" data-medium-file="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11-320x233.png" data-large-file="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/image-11-960x698.png" />		</a>
	</figure>
	<div class="text-cont">
		<header class="entry-header">
			<h2 class="entry-title">

			<div class="post-category"><span class="screen-reader-text">Pubblicato in</span><a href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/category/tutto-per-i-bambini/articoli-per-bambini/" rel="category tag">Articoli per bambini</a></div>			<h2 class="entry-title">
				<a href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/albero-di-natale-fatto-con-riviste-di-giornale/" rel="bookmark"
				   title="Albero di Natale fatto con riviste di giornale">Albero di Natale fatto con riviste di giornale</a>
			</h2>
		</header>
		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="post-author"><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/author/wp_4058384/">segnatiilmioblogit</a></span>			<span class="post-date"><span class="screen-reader-text"> Scritto il </span> <a href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/albero-di-natale-fatto-con-riviste-di-giornale/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2020-11-18T16:11:18+00:00">18 Novembre 2020</time><time class="updated" datetime="2020-12-28T12:00:33+00:00">28 Dicembre 2020</time></a></span>		</div>
		<div class="entry-summary">
			Per questo Natale ho trovato una bel lavoretto per creare degli alberelli natalizi. L&#8217;ispirazione mi&hellip;		</div>
	</div>
</article>

	</figure>
	<div class="text-cont">
		<header class="entry-header">
			<div class="post-category"><span class="screen-reader-text">Pubblicato in</span><a href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/category/tutto-per-i-bambini/disegni-da-colorare-per-bambini-articoli-per-bambini/" rel="category tag">Disegni da colorare per bambini</a></div>			<h2 class="entry-title">
				<a href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/streghetta-di-halloween-disegni-da-colorare/" rel="bookmark"
				   title="Streghetta di Halloween disegni da colorare">Streghetta di Halloween disegni da colorare</a>
			</h2>
		</header>
		<div class="entry-meta">
			<span class="post-author"><a class="url fn n" href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/author/disegna/">Maria Amato - Segnatiilmioblog</a></span>			<span class="post-date"><span class="screen-reader-text"> Scritto il </span> <a href="https://www.segnatiilmioblog.it/streghetta-di-halloween-disegni-da-colorare/" rel="bookmark"><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2025-09-27T16:02:57+00:00">27 Settembre 2025</time><time class="updated" datetime="2025-11-06T11:40:30+00:00">6 Novembre 2025</time></a></span>		</div>
		<div class="entry-summary">
			streghetta di Halloween molto carina e simpatica, con occhioni grandi e ciglia lunghe, un vestitino&hellip;		</div>
	</div>
</article>

		function genesisBlocksShare( url, title, w, h ){
			var left = ( window.innerWidth / 2 )-( w / 2 );
			var top  = ( window.innerHeight / 2 )-( h / 2 );
			return window.open(url, title, 'toolbar=no, location=no, directories=no, status=no, menubar=no, scrollbars=no, resizable=no, copyhistory=no, width=600, height=600, top='+top+', left='+left);
		}
